items.title: 'It's ruined my life': Hundreds tell BBC how medication triggered gambling and other addictions
items.description: More than 250 people contacted us describing impulsive behaviour side effects from prescription drugs.

items.title: Two men aged 19 and 20 die after going missing on Yr Wyddfa
items.description: Mountain rescue teams were launched in challenging conditions to try and find the pair.

items.title: Government considers removing Andrew from royal line of succession
items.description: The former Duke of York is eighth in line to the throne meaning he remains eligible to be King.

items.title: GB go for men's curling gold and Atkin in halfpipe final - Saturday's guide
items.description: What's happening and who to look out for at the 2026 Winter Olympics in Milan-Cortina.

items.title: Avalanches kill five in Austrian Alps, officials say
items.description: A man skiing with his son was among the victims on Friday, bringing the region's avalanche death toll this season to at least 21.
